title: Rispwind's Additional Paintings
description: Adds 55 new paintings based on official Minecraft art.
body:
Rispwind's Additional Paintings adds 55 new paintings to the game based on official Minecraft promotional and concept art.
**The current paintings:**

-Together

-Witherstorm

-Cave Exit

-Dragon

-Birch Forest

-Piglin

-Frog

-Warden

-Boat

-View

-Garden Awakens

-Overworld

-Happy Ghast

-Drowned

-Dennis

-Jack

-Desert

-Copper Golem

-Waterfall Squid

-Creaking

-Cold Cow

-Fireplace

-Malgosha

-Chungus

-In The Dark

-Beacontown

-Farlands

-Orb of Dominance

-Jungle Abomination

-Illagers

-Alex Face

-Pig Face

-Skeleton Face
